arts.ttl: Millwall defender Joe Bryan: We’ll show maximum respect to Dagenham & Redbridge
arts.sum: Joe Bryan has made it clear that none of Millwall’s players will be visualising a plum FA Cup fourth round draw before they face Dagenham and Redbridge at The Den on Monday night. “We need to beat Dagenham and not think too far past Monday’s game.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Woyo Coulibaly to Leicester, Philip Billing to Napoli
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Woyo Coulibaly to Leicester City and Philip Billing to Napoli.
